src_raw: 2018年是全球金融危機發生十周年，十年間國際政經形勢經歷巨大轉變，當中不乏一幕幕超乎最佳編劇所能想像的場景。我在去年的年報指出，2017年金融市場表現是「喜出望外」，同時提到前景「潛藏隱憂」。回顧2018年，或許可形容為「先喜後悲」。環球多個股票指數在1月創出歷史新高後不久，熾熱的投資情緒旋即遇上中美貿易摩擦的冷鋒，加上英國脫歐談判一直拉鋸、地緣政治惡化、美聯儲四次加息等因素，市場樂觀氣氛急劇逆轉，資產價格在年內大幅下跌。MSCI全球指數從高點至低點曾下跌20.3%，全年累跌約一成，是2008年環球金融危機以來表現最差的一年。恒生指數從高點最多曾下跌26.7%，全年下挫13.6%，錄得七年來最大年度跌幅。
mt_raw: 2018 marked the tenth anniversary of the global financial crisis. Over the past decade, the international political and economic landscape has undergone tremendous changes, with many scenarios exceeding even the wildest imaginings of screenwriters. In last year’s annual report, I pointed out that the performance of the financial markets in 2017 was "beyond expectations," while also noting that the outlook "concealed underlying risks." Reflecting on 2018, it can perhaps be described as "joy followed by sorrow." Shortly after several global stock indices reached historical highs in January, sizzling investment sentiment was immediately met with the cold front of U.S.-China trade tensions. Coupled with ongoing Brexit negotiations, deteriorating geopolitical risks, multiple rate hikes by the Federal Reserve, and other factors, market optimism sharply reversed, and asset prices experienced significant declines during the year. The MSCI World Index fell by as much as 20.3% from its peak to trough, with an annual decline of about 10%, marking the worst year since the 2008 global financial crisis. The Hang Seng Index dropped as much as 26.7% from its peak, ending the year down 13.6%, recording the largest annual decline in seven years.

src_raw: 儘管外圍形勢波動難測，香港金融體系仍然保持穩健，貨幣市場運作暢順無阻。實施三十五年的聯繫匯率制度成功應對了資金流出港元的考驗。自環球金融危機爆發以來，累積約10,000億港元等值的資金流入港元。去年，隨着美國息率上升，港美息差持續擴闊，「沽港元、買美元」套息活動增加，港元兌美元匯率在年初轉弱，2005年制訂的「弱方兌換保證」，自4月首度觸發後，年內再觸發26次。金管局按照既定機制，履行「買港元、沽美元」的弱方兌換保證，有序、透明地在市場承接1,035億港元的港元沽盤。隨着資金流走，一個月香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內累升了105基點，而銀行亦在去年9月美國加息後，上調了最優惠利率。金管局多次和適時通過不同渠道向公眾闡釋「弱方兌換保證」的運作機制，令公眾了解資金流出港元是香港利率正常化的必經過程，也是聯匯制度的正常運作。國際貨幣基金組織在去年年底重申支持香港聯匯制度的立場，特區政府也強調聯匯是香港貨幣穩定的基石。這都有助於穩定香港市民對聯繫匯率的信心。
mt_raw: Despite turbulent external conditions and unpredictable market movements, Hong Kong’s financial system remained robust, with smooth and uninterrupted operation of the monetary market. The thirty-five-year-old Linked Exchange Rate System successfully responded to the challenge of capital outflows from the Hong Kong dollar. Since the outbreak of the global financial crisis, approximately HKD 1 trillion equivalent in funds have flowed into the Hong Kong dollar. Last year, as U.S. interest rates rose, the interest rate differential between Hong Kong and the U.S. continued to widen, increasing carry trade activities of "selling Hong Kong dollars, buying U.S. dollars." The HKD/USD exchange rate weakened at the start of the year, and the "Weak Side Convertibility Undertaking" established in 2005 was triggered for the first time in April, with the mechanism being activated 26 more times during the year. Under the established mechanism, the HKMA fulfilled the "buy Hong Kong dollars, sell U.S. dollars" provision of the Weak Side Convertibility Undertaking in an orderly and transparent manner, absorbing HKD 103.5 billion in market sell-offs. As capital flowed out, the one-month Hong Kong interbank interest rate increased by 105 basis points in 2018. Following the Fed’s rate hike in September, banks also raised their best lending rates. The HKMA repeatedly and timely explained the operation of the Weak Side Convertibility Undertaking through various channels, helping the public understand that capital outflows are a natural part of interest rate normalisation and the proper functioning of the linked exchange rate system. The International Monetary Fund reaffirmed its support for Hong Kong’s linked exchange rate system at the end of last year, and the Hong Kong SAR government also emphasized that the linked exchange rate is the cornerstone of Hong Kong’s monetary stability. These efforts have helped to maintain public confidence in the system.

src_raw: 2008年環球金融危機暴露了全球金融系統潛藏的種種弊端及隱患，促使國際間在過去十年協調推出一系列針對金融市場、金融機構的改革，包括在銀行業監管方面，提升企業管治和風險管理。金管局的銀行監管工作重點針對兩方面：一是着眼於銀行資產負債風險的審慎監管，二是銀行的行為操守，二者不可偏廢。資產負債風險監管方面，金管局作為巴塞爾銀行監管委員會(Basel Committee on Banking Supervision)及二十國集團轄下金融穩定理事會(FinancialStability Board)成員，有責任全面落實國際監管標準，確保香港銀行業穩健審慎地經營業務。去年底香港銀行資本充足率達20.3%，不但遠高於國際最低標準要求的8%，也較環球金融危機時的14.7%水平顯著提升。大型銀行去年第四季平均流動覆蓋比率達167.6%，同樣遠高於法定最低要求的90%。與此同時，為避免重蹈環球金融危機時需動用公帑拯救「大得不能倒」金融機構的覆轍，金融穩定理事會制訂了關於金融機構處置機制的國際標準。香港是亞洲區內少數已經全面落實符合機制要求的地區之一，金管局下設的處置機制辦公室正落實該機制的操作細則，要求銀行推行結構性變動令處置預案在需要時能有效實施，去年亦推出了《吸收虧損能力規則》，未來還會陸續推出更多相關規則。
mt_raw: The 2008 global financial crisis exposed many systemic flaws and hidden dangers within the global financial system, prompting coordinated reforms over the past ten years targeting financial markets and institutions, including enhancing corporate governance and risk management in banking regulation. The HKMA’s focus in banking supervision is twofold: first, prudential supervision of bank asset and liability risks; second, conduct regulation of bank behaviour. Both are equally important. On the prudential side, as a member of the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision and the Financial Stability Board, the HKMA bears responsibility for implementing international standards to ensure the sound and prudent operation of Hong Kong banks. By the end of last year, Hong Kong’s capital adequacy ratio reached 20.3%, significantly higher than the minimum international requirement of 8% and up from the 14.7% level during the global financial crisis. The average liquidity coverage ratio of major banks in Q4 last year was 167.6%, well above the statutory minimum of 90%. Simultaneously, to avoid repeating the crisis-era need for public funding to rescue "too big to fail" institutions, the Financial Stability Board has established international standards regarding resolution mechanisms for financial institutions. Hong Kong is among the few regions in Asia that has fully adopted this framework, with the HKMA’s Resolution Office implementing detailed operational procedures. Banks are required to implement structural adjustment plans to ensure effective resolution if needed. Last year, the HKMA also introduced the Loss-Absorbing Capacity (LAC) Rules, with more regulations to follow.

src_raw: 鑑於樓價持續上升，金管局未雨綢繆，在2009至2017年間共推出八輪逆周期措施，確保一旦地產市況逆轉，本港銀行體系有足夠的抗震能力應對衝擊。這些措施成效顯著：新造住宅平均按揭成數由2009年的64%降至2018年底的46%；平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年的41%下調至2018年底的34%。年內銀行信貸錄得4.4%的溫和增長，整體資產質素維持良好，零售銀行不良貸款比率進一步降至0.5%，遠低於國際及本港歷史平均水平。去年銀行業盈利持續增長，整體股東權益回報率連升兩年至13%；多家國際性銀行集團在本港的業務交出了不俗的成績表，成為集團盈利的重要支柱。
mt_raw: Given the continuous rise in property prices, the HKMA has taken proactive measures. Between 2009 and 2017, eight rounds of countercyclical measures were introduced to ensure the banking sector’s resilience against potential housing market downturns. These measures proved effective: the average mortgage-to-value ratio for new residential loans decreased from 64% in 2009 to 46% at the end of 2018, while the average debt-service ratio dropped from 41% in 2010 to 34% at year’s end. Bank credit growth remained modest at 4.4% during the year, with overall asset quality maintained at a good level. The retail banking sector’s non-performing loan ratio further decreased to 0.5%, well below international and historical averages. Profitability continued to grow last year, with the overall return on equity rising for the second consecutive year to 13%. Several international banks operating in Hong Kong achieved impressive results, becoming important pillars of their group’s profitability.

src_raw: 在監管銀行的行為操守方面，金管局在2010年增設銀行操守部，促進銀行公平待客，並加強保障消費者權益。要做到標本兼治，除了訂出各種針對銀行營運基本操守的監管要求外，我們近年來大力推動改革銀行文化，鼓勵銀行循管治、獎勵制度、評估與回饋機制三方面推動穩善文化，務求銀行內部做到上行下效，在根本上恢復、提升客戶對銀行的信任和尊重。繼2017年金管局向全港銀行提供具體的指引，金管局在2018年底進一步推出銀行文化的監管措施，包括要求銀行就企業文化和落實有關措施作出自我評估等，令穩善銀行文化的三大支柱能有效執行。
mt_raw: In strengthening conduct regulation among banks, the HKMA established the Bank Conduct Department in 2010 to promote fair treatment of customers and enhance consumer rights protection. To effectively address both symptoms and root causes, in recent years, we have worked to reform banking culture through governance, incentive systems, and evaluation and feedback mechanisms, aiming for internal alignment and a renewed sense of trust and respect among customers. After providing specific guidance to all banks in 2017, the HKMA further introduced supervision measures for banking culture at the end of 2018. These include requiring banks to conduct self-assessments on corporate culture and the implementation of related measures, ensuring the three pillars of a prudent and ethical banking culture are robustly enacted.

src_raw: 雖然互聯網和移動金融是全球趨勢，金管局去年仍繼續促進普及金融，照顧未能應用新科技的社群。例如我們連同香港銀行公會推動便利店推出長者透過「易辦事」免購物提款服務，有關便利店網絡已增至逾300家；我們並聯絡香港郵政在7家主要位於離島和新界的郵政局推出長者提款易服務。銀行業界響應金管局的建議，年內積極增加無障礙設施，提供傷健共融的銀行服務，例子之一是設有聲音導航的自動櫃員機數目一年內增加逾十倍至超過700部。另外，在金管局積極推動下，我們預期將會陸續有銀行在偏遠地區開設更多實體分行和增設流動銀行服務，便利市民。
mt_raw: Despite the global trend toward internet and mobile banking, last year the HKMA continued to promote financial inclusion, supporting communities that have yet to adopt new technologies. For instance, in collaboration with the Hong Kong Bankers Association, we launched a service allowing elderly customers to withdraw cash via "easily accessible" shops without shopping. The network of such convenient stores expanded to over 300 locations. We also coordinated with Hongkong Post to introduce the "Elderly Cash Withdrawal" service at seven major post offices in remote islands and the New Territories. Banks actively responded to the HKMA’s recommendations by increasing barrier-free facilities, offering inclusive banking services—one example being the number of voice-guided ATMs increasing more than tenfold to over 700 machines within a year. Additionally, under the HKMA’s proactive initiative, more physical branches and mobile bank services are expected to open in remote areas, improving accessibility for citizens.

src_raw: 金管局與銀行和科技業界緊密合作，在2017年9月啟動「智慧銀行新紀元」，推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為市民帶來嶄新的支付和銀行服務體驗。2018年的亮點，無疑是在9月正式開通的「轉數快」。它是全球獨一無二的零售快速支付系統，打破香港各種電子支付工具和銀行帳戶之間的屏障，讓市民享受全年無休的港元和人民幣即時轉帳服務。金管局還同步推出全球首個「共用二維碼」標準和應用程式，商戶可憑單個二維碼接通多個電子支付系統。「轉數快」推出以來深受市民歡迎，短短半年，登記紀錄已逾258萬個，日均交易量達6萬宗，平均每宗金額分別20,700港元和38,000元人民幣。
mt_raw: The HKMA has worked closely with banks and the tech industry to launch the "New Era of Smart Banking" in September 2017, promoting the development and innovation of Hong Kong’s fintech ecosystem to offer citizens a novel payment and banking experience. A highlight last year was the official launch of "Faster Payment System" (FPS) in September. It is a unique retail real-time payment system that breaks down barriers between various electronic payment tools and bank accounts in Hong Kong, enabling 24/7 transfer services in Hong Kong dollars and renminbi. The HKMA also unveiled the world's first "Shared QR Code" standard and its application, allowing merchants to accept multiple payment schemes via a single QR code. Since its launch, FPS has been well received, with over 2.58 million registrations, an average of 60,000 transactions per day, and average transaction amounts of HKD 20,700 and RMB 38,000 respectively.

src_raw: 去年5月，金管局發出虛擬銀行的認可指引，隨即有33家機構提交虛擬銀行牌照的申請。截至今年四月中，四個牌照已經發出，預期它們將於年內正式投入營運。虛擬銀行有助推動香港金融科技發展和創新，為個人和中小企提供嶄新服務和體驗，並促進普及金融。
mt_raw: Last May, the HKMA issued guidelines for the authorization of virtual banks. To date, 33 institutions applied for virtual banking licenses, and four licenses have been granted as of mid-April, with expected operational start within the year. Virtual banks help advance Hong Kong’s fintech development, providing new services and experiences for individuals and SMEs, and promoting financial inclusion.

src_raw: 此外，金管局在7月發布開放應用程式介面(OpenAPI)框架，銀行將分四階段開放產品和服務的對外接口，開創更靈活、更開放的金融科技環境，讓銀行客戶更便捷地整合帳戶資料、獲取資訊，選取貼合自己需要的服務。年內，共有42項新科技產品使用金管局的金融科技監管沙盒進行測試，當中28項完成試行，有關產品和服務已順利推出市場。
mt_raw: In addition, the HKMA released the Open API framework in July, allowing banks to open their product and service interfaces in four stages. This fosters a more flexible and open fintech environment, enabling customers to easily integrate account data, access information, and choose services tailored to their needs. Within the year, 42 new tech products were tested within the HKMA’s fintech sandbox, of which 28 completed trials, and their services are now being introduced to the market smoothly.

mt_raw: The battle among international financial centres is a contest of soft power. Apart from assisting the government in preparing a HKD 100 billion green bond issuance programme, we hosted multiple green finance seminars last year, including two major international conferences, to increase awareness, understanding, and participation in green finance, encouraging issuers to engage in the government’s green bond support scheme and Hong Kong’s Green Finance Certification Scheme. src_raw: 香港金融管理局是香港的中央銀行機構，主要職能有4項：在聯繫匯率制度的架構內維持貨幣穩定；促進金融體系（包括銀行體系）的穩定與健全；協助鞏固香港的國際金融中心地位，包括維持與發展香港的金融基建；以及管理外匯基金。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) is Hong Kong’s central banking institution, with four main functions: maintaining monetary stability within the framework of the linked exchange rate system; promoting the stability and soundness of the financial system, including banking; assisting in consolidating Hong Kong’s position as an international financial centre, including maintaining and developing Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure; and managing the Exchange Fund.

src_raw: 金融管理專員的權力、職能及責任由《外匯基金條例》、《銀行業條例》、《金融機構（處置機制）條例》、《存款保障計劃條例》、《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》及其他有關條例明文規定。財政司司長與金融管理專員於2003年6月25日的互換函件，列載彼此在貨幣與金融事務方面的職能與責任的分配，亦披露財政司司長將若干權力轉授金融管理專員。有關函件為公開文件，可於金管局網站查閱。
mt_raw: The powers, functions, and responsibilities of the Monetary Authority are explicitly outlined in the Exchange Fund Ordinance, the Banking Ordinance, the Financial Institutions (Resolution) Ordinance, the Deposit Protection Scheme Ordinance, the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance, and other relevant legislation. This letter is a public document available on the HKMA’s website.

src_raw: 財政司司長負責釐定香港的貨幣政策目標及貨幣體制：財政司司長於2003年6月25日致金融管理專員的函件中，訂明應透過貨幣發行局制度維持貨幣穩定，將港元匯率保持在約7.80港元兌1美元的水平。金融管理專員須自行負責達成貨幣政策目標，包括決定有關的策略、工具及執行方式，並負責維持香港貨幣制度的穩定與健全。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary is responsible for setting Hong Kong’s monetary policy objectives and framework. In a letter dated June 25, 2003, the Financial Secretary instructs the MA to maintain monetary stability through the issuance of currency, keeping the Hong Kong dollar’s exchange rate approximately at 7.80 HKD to 1 USD. The MA must independently achieve these policy objectives, including determining strategies, tools, and implementation methods, and is responsible for maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s monetary system.

src_raw:
財政司司長在財經事務及庫務局局長的協助下，負責維持香港金融體系穩定與健全，以及保持香港的國際金融中心地位的政策。為推行這些政策，金融管理專員的職責包括：
- 促進銀行體系的整體穩定與有效運作
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，發展債務市場
- 處理與法定紙幣及硬幣的發行及流通有關的事宜
- 透過發展支付、結算及交收系統，以及在適當情況下負責操作有關系統，促進金融基建的安全與效率
- 與其他有關機構與組織合作，促進對香港貨幣及金融體系的信心，並推行適當的發展市場措施，以協助加強香港金融服務的國際競爭力。
mt_raw:
In cooperation with the Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, the Financial Secretary is responsible for maintaining the stability and soundness of Hong Kong’s financial system and supporting its development as an international financial centre. The MA’s responsibilities in implementing these policies include:
- Promoting the overall stability and effective operation of the banking system
- Collaborating with other institutions and organizations to develop the debt market
- Handling issuance and circulation of legal tender notes and coins
- Developing and overseeing payment, settlement, and clearing systems to promote the safety and efficiency of financial infrastructure
- Cooperating with relevant institutions to foster confidence in Hong Kong’s monetary and financial system and implementing appropriate market development measures to enhance Hong Kong’s global financial competitiveness

src_raw:
金融管理專員由財政司司長委任，因此金管局透過財政司司長向公眾負責；而由於金管局的職權由立法會通過的法律制訂，因此金管局亦透過立法會向公眾負責。此外，金管局亦明白本身肩負更廣泛的責任，就是促進公眾對金管局角色及目標的認識，並密切留意社會人士所關注的事項。金管局在執行日常工作及與社會保持廣泛聯繫時，堅守盡力提高透明度及保持開放的政策。這項政策有兩大目標：
- 在顧及市場敏感性、商業秘密及機密資料披露的法定限制下，盡量使金融界及公眾充分了解金管局的工作；
- 確保金管局掌握社會脈搏，並對公眾意見作出適當回應。
mt_raw:
The MA, appointed by the Financial Secretary, is accountable to the public through the Financial Secretary. Since its powers are established by legislation passed by the Legislative Council, the HKMA also responds to the public through the Legislative Council. Additionally, the HKMA recognizes its broader responsibility to promote public understanding of its role and goals and to monitor societal concerns. The HKMA adheres to a policy of maximizing transparency and openness in executing its daily functions and engaging with society, with two main objectives:
- Under statutory restrictions related to market sensitivity, proprietary information, and confidentiality, to keep the financial industry and the public well-informed about the HKMA’s work
- To stay in tune with public sentiment and respond appropriately to public feedback

src_raw: 金管局在透明度方面致力達致國際最高標準，與傳媒保持廣泛聯繫之餘，亦出版各種中英文期刊及專題刊物。金管局的雙語網站(www.hkma.gov.hk)除有專門環節列載經濟研究、統計資料、消費者資訊及其他課題外，還載有金管局出版的刊物、新聞稿、演辭及簡報會資料文件。此外，金管局又利用社交媒體平台，以能在數碼時代中更有效與公眾溝通。金管局辦事處設有資訊中心，分為圖書館及展覽館兩部分，每星期開放6日予公眾參觀及使用。金管局亦舉辦公眾教育活動，透過講座及資訊中心導賞服務，向公眾人士（特別是學生）講解金管局的工作，以及增進市民的金融知識。有關金管局的傳媒聯繫工作、刊物及公眾教育活動的詳細資料，見「機構職能」一章。
mt_raw: In terms of transparency, the HKMA strives to meet the highest international standards. It maintains broad communication with the media and publishes various bilingual journals and reports. Its bilingual website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides dedicated sections on economic research, statistics, consumer information, and other topics, along with publications, press releases, speeches, and briefing materials. The HKMA also uses social media platforms for more effective communication with the public in the digital age. The HKMA’s offices house an information centre, comprising a library and an exhibition hall, which are open six days a week to the public. The HKMA conducts public education activities, including seminars and guided tours of the information centre, to explain its functions and enhance financial literacy among the public (especially students). Details of the HKMA’s media relations, publications, and public education activities are provided in the “Institutional Functions” chapter.

src_raw: 財政司司長行使外匯基金的控制權時，會聽取外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。外匯基金諮詢委員會根據《外匯基金條例》第3(1)條成立。該項條文訂明財政司司長行使對外匯基金的控制權時，須諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會的意見。財政司司長為外匯基金諮詢委員會的當然主席，其他委員（包括金融管理專員）則以個人身分，由財政司司長根據香港特別行政區行政長官的授權委任。委員因各具專業知識及經驗而獲委任，他們的加入讓外匯基金諮詢委員會廣受裨益。委員的專業知識及經驗涵蓋貨幣、金融、經濟、投資、會計、管理、商業及法律等範疇。
mt_raw: The Financial Secretary listens to the advice of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee when exercising control over the Exchange Fund. The Committee was established under Article 3(1) of the Exchange Fund Ordinance, which states that the Financial Secretary shall consult the Committee when exercising control over the Exchange Fund. The Financial Secretary is the ex-officio chair of the Committee, and other members (including the MA) are appointed in their personal capacities by the Financial Secretary, authorized by the Chief Executive of the HKSAR. Members are appointed for their expertise and experience in fields such as monetary policy, finance, economics, investment, accounting, management, commerce, and law, bringing broad benefits to the Committee. The Committee has established five specialized sub-committees responsible for overseeing specific aspects of the HKMA’s work and reporting or advising to the Financial Secretary.

src_raw: 2018年香港經濟進一步擴張，不過按年增長速度由第1季的4.6%，逐步減慢至第4季的1.3%（表1），並拖累全年增長率由2017年的3.8%下降至3.0%。經濟擴張轉弱，反映本地需求增長減慢以及經濟持續受淨出口所拖累（圖1）。本地方面，私人消費在第1季強勁增長，但其後增長動力減弱，部分反映貿易保護主義升溫令不明朗因素增加，以及本地資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應。由於營商信心脆弱，整體投資支出的增長速度亦放緩。外圍方面，貨品出口於首3季大致保持平穩，但在第4季隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇而顯著轉差。貨品進口亦因為出口帶動的需求轉弱而放緩。相比之下，服務輸出錄得較快的全年增長，部分是受惠於訪港旅遊業表現蓬勃，而服務輸入則由於運輸、商業及其他服務增長而得以大致維持增長動力。按淨額計，貿易差額由2017年的順差轉為2018年的小幅逆差，並拖累本地經濟增長。
mt_raw: In 2018, Hong Kong’s economy further expanded, but the annual growth rate gradually slowed from 4.6% in the first quarter to 1.3% in the fourth quarter (Table 1), dragging the full-year growth rate from 3.8% in 2017 to 3.0%. The weakening of economic expansion reflected a slowdown in domestic demand growth and ongoing drag from net exports (Figure 1). Domestically, private consumption grew strongly in the first quarter but its momentum weakened thereafter, partly due to increased uncertainties from trade protectionism and the wealth depreciation effect caused by adjustments in domestic asset prices. Due to weak business confidence, the overall investment expenditure growth also decelerated. On the external front, merchandise exports remained roughly stable in the first three quarters but significantly declined in the fourth quarter amid escalating US-China trade tensions. Merchandise imports also slowed down in response to weakening export demand. By contrast, service exports recorded faster growth overall, partly benefitting from the robust performance of inbound tourism, while service imports maintained a similar growth rate due to increases in transportation, commercial, and other services. Net trade balance turned from a surplus in 2017 to a small deficit in 2018, thereby exerting a drag on the local economy.

src_raw: 主要受到港元與美元負息差下的套息活動所影響，港元兌美元匯率在2018年大致回軟。尤其弱方兌換保證在4月、5月及8月被觸發，促使金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）所定，在7.85港元兌1美元的水平，向銀行購入港元及沽出美元。按照聯匯制度的設計，港元貨幣基礎因而收縮，表示銀行同業流動性減少，再加上市場預期美國加息，導致港元銀行同業拆息整體上升。由於銀行體系資金成本上升，銀行於9月下旬在美國聯邦基金利率目標區間上調後，調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。信貸增長方面，部分由於本地經濟增長放緩以及對外貿易表現轉弱，整體銀行貸款的增幅由2017年的16.1%，顯著減慢至2018年的4.4%。
mt_raw: Mainly influenced by the carry trade activities driven by the negative interest rate differential between the Hong Kong dollar and the US dollar, the HKD/USD exchange rate generally weakened in 2018. Notably, the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered in April, May, and August, prompting the Hong Kong Monetary Authority (HKMA) to buy HKD and sell USD according to the linked exchange rate system (LERS), at the level of HK$7.85 per USD. Under the design of the linked exchange rate system, the Hong Kong dollar monetary base contracted, indicating a reduction in interbank liquidity. Market expectations of US rate hikes further contributed to the overall rise of HKD interbank interest rates. As funding costs for banks increased, some banks raised their best lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points following the US Federal Reserve’s adjustment of the federal funds rate target range in late September. In terms of credit growth, partly due to the slowdown in the domestic economy and weakened external trade performance, the growth of overall bank loans decelerated markedly from 16.1% in 2017 to 4.4% in 2018.

src_raw: 通脹壓力於2018年略為增加。剔除政府一次性紓緩措施的影響後，基本通脹率由2017年的1.7%低位，升至2018年的2.6%，不過仍屬於溫和水平。當中的住屋租金組成項目增幅較快，反映較早前新簽訂私人住宅租金上升的影響（圖2）。更廣泛的分析顯示，名義勞工成本及商用物業租金增長略為加快，令本地成本壓力更趨明顯。隨着香港部分主要進口來源地通脹上升，進口價格通脹亦因而攀升。
mt_raw: Pressure from inflation increased slightly in 2018. Excluding the effect of one-off government relief measures, the core inflation rate rose from 1.7% in 2017 to 2.6% in 2018, remaining moderate. Among the components, rental prices of housing rose faster, reflecting the rise in newly signed private residential leases earlier (Figure 2). Broader analysis shows that growth in nominal labor costs and commercial property rents accelerated slightly, making local cost pressures more apparent. As inflation rose in some main source countries of imports, import price inflation also increased accordingly.

src_raw: 勞工市場狀況在2018年保持穩健（圖3）。失業率由2017年全年的3.1%下降至2018年的2.8%，是自1997年以來的最低水平。當中大部分主要服務行業的失業率都有所回落，特別是住宿及膳食服務業的跌幅更為顯著。隨着總就業人數及私營機構職位空缺進一步增加，整體勞工需求持續增強，而且勞動人口參與率亦輕微上升。在勞工市場狀況趨緊下，實質工資及收入進一步增加。
mt_raw: The labour market remained steady in 2018 (Figure 3). The unemployment rate fell from 3.1% for the whole of 2017 to 2.8% in 2018, the lowest since 1997. Unemployment rates declined in most key service sectors, particularly in accommodation and food services. With further increases in total employment and vacancies in the private sector, overall labour demand strengthened, and the labour force participation rate also slightly increased. Under tightened labour market conditions, nominal wages and income continued to rise.

src_raw: 香港股市走勢在2018年大幅逆轉。恒生指數在2017年強勁的上升動力帶動下，於2018年1月升上33,484點的歷史高位（圖4）。然而，隨着主要中央銀行收緊貨幣政策、中美貿易摩擦加劇及本地經濟增長放緩引起投資者的憂慮，市場的樂觀情緒急劇逆轉。恒生指數在10月下挫至24,586點的低位，在年底則收報25,846點，較一年前下跌13.6%。然而，平均每日成交額則由2017年的882億港元上升至1,074億港元，本港首次公開招股集資總額亦因數間從事新興及創科產業的企業上市而大幅增加。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s stock market experienced a significant reversal in 2018. Driven by the strong upward momentum in 2017, the Hang Seng Index rose to a record high of 33,484 points in January 2018 (Figure 4). However, rising concerns among investors triggered by the central banks’ tightening of monetary policies, escalating US-China trade tensions, and the slowdown of the domestic economy led to a sharp reversal in sentiment. The Hang Seng Index fell to a low of 24,586 points in October and closed the year at 25,846, representing a decline of 13.6% compared with a year earlier. Nevertheless, the average daily turnover increased from HK$88.2 billion in 2017 to HK$107.4 billion, and the total funds raised through the initial public offerings (IPOs) in Hong Kong significantly grew due to listings by companies engaged in emerging and innovative sectors.

src_raw: 住宅物業市場在2018年上半年保持暢旺，不過在下半年隨着中美貿易摩擦加劇、環球股市調整及本港最優惠利率上升而有所降溫。整體樓價在7月至12月期間由高位回落9%，然而全年計仍錄得2%的升幅（圖4）。由於一手及二手市場的買賣活動於下半年顯著減少，所以物業成交量在2018年亦較前一年下跌7%至57,247宗。此外，置業負擔能力仍然偏緊，樓價與收入比率以及收入槓桿比率分別為17.0及75.7，兩者均遠高於長期平均水平。另一方面，非住宅物業價格在2018年整體上升，惟接近年底時稍見回落。全年計，價格及租金均進一步上升，租金回報率則維持在低位。
mt_raw: The residential property market remained buoyant in the first half of 2018 but cooled down in the second half amid escalating US-China trade tensions, global stock market adjustments, and rising local best lending rates. Overall property prices declined by 9% from their peak between July and December, but still recorded a 2% increase for the whole year (Figure 4). Due to a significant drop in transaction activity in both primary and secondary markets in the second half, total property transactions fell by 7% to 57,247 in 2018. Affordability remained tight, with the ratio of property prices to income and debt-service ratio standing at 17.0 and 75.7 respectively, both well above their long-term averages. On the other hand, non-residential property prices generally rose in 2018 but showed slight declines towards the end of the year. Overall, prices and rentals increased further, while rental yields remained low.

src_raw: 由於全球經濟增長放緩，預期2019年香港經濟增長將會減慢。尤其外圍環境充滿挑戰，預期香港出口表現仍會受壓。本地方面，雖然失業率低企及家庭收入增加將繼續支撐私人消費，但部分由於消費信心減弱及較早前的資產價格調整帶來的財富減值效應的影響，預期私人消費增長步伐會放緩。固定資本形成方面，雖然隨着房屋供應增加，樓宇及建造活動應會穩步增長，但面對經濟不明朗因素增加，企業對於資本投資可能會變得更為審慎。政府預測2019年實質本地生產總值增長率介乎2至3%之間，私營機構分析員的最新預測增幅則平均為2.3%。
mt_raw: Owing to the slowdown in global economic growth, it is expected that Hong Kong’s economic growth will also slow down in 2019. In particular, external challenges are expected to continue weighing on Hong Kong’s export performance. Domestically, despite low unemployment and rising household incomes continuing to support private consumption, growth is expected to slow due to weakening consumer confidence and the wealth depreciation effect from earlier asset price adjustments. Regarding fixed capital formation, although increased housing supply and steady growth in office and construction activities are anticipated, heightened economic uncertainties may lead enterprises to adopt a more cautious stance on capital investment. The government forecasts real gross domestic product (GDP) growth of between 2% and 3% in 2019, while recent estimates from private sector analysts suggest an average growth of 2.3%.

src_raw: 由於包括香港在內的全球增長放緩，外圍物價及本地成本壓力或會得到紓緩，因此預期通脹壓力在2019年仍保持溫和。近期新簽訂住宅租金回落，亦會對通脹產生壓抑作用。市場共識預測2019年整體通脹率為2.2%，政府預期基本通脹率則為2.5%。預期在經濟持續增長及訪港旅遊業維持暢旺下，勞工市場狀況會繼續偏緊。私營機構分析員預計失業率於2019年會維持於約3%的水平。
mt_raw: As global growth, including that of Hong Kong, slows, external commodity prices and domestic cost pressures are expected to ease, resulting in moderate inflation pressures remaining in 2019. Recent declines in newly signed residential rents will also exert downward pressure on inflation. Market consensus projects an overall inflation rate of 2.2% for 2019, with the government’s estimate of core inflation at 2.5%. Under continued economic expansion and sustained inbound tourism, the labour market is expected to remain tight. Private sector analysts forecast the unemployment rate to stay around 3% in 2019.

src_raw: 另外，住宅物業市場受眾多外圍及本地因素所影響，其前景並不明朗。外圍方面，中美貿易摩擦的不確定性將有可能影響市場情緒、經濟前景及金融狀況，使香港物業市場前景繼續蒙上陰影。本地方面，雖然經濟增長放緩，但就業情況及收入增長仍大致穩定，或可支持住宅物業需求。本港利率的走勢某程度上視乎美國未來的政策利率變動，惟後者走勢並不明確。長遠而言，由於過去幾年住宅落成量有所增加，加上政府致力增加土地及房屋供應，預期房屋供求缺口或會收窄。
mt_raw: Furthermore, the prospects for the residential property market remain uncertain due to multiple external and domestic factors. On the external side, uncertainty over US-China trade tensions could influence sentiment, economic outlook, and financial conditions, clouding Hong Kong’s property market prospects. Domestically, although growth is expected to slow, stable employment and income growth may support housing demand. The trajectory of local interest rates depends largely on the US’s future policy rate changes, which remain unclear. In the long run, increased housing completions over the past few years and government efforts to expand land and housing supply are expected to narrow the housing supply-demand gap.

src_raw: 2018年銀行體系繼續穩步增長，資產負債表擴大5.9%。面對經濟不明朗因素持續，例如主要經濟體之間的貿易衝突及加息等，企業在獲取新貸款方面變得較為保守。年內貸款總額增幅放緩至4.4%，而2017年為16.1%。有關增長受在香港使用的貸款（+6.5%）及在香港境外使用的貸款（+2%）同告增加帶動。另一方面，由於環球貿易環境不明朗，貿易融資下跌7.6%。中國內地相關貸款的增長亦由2017年的17.5%放緩至2018年的1.4%。
mt_raw: In 2018, the banking sector continued to grow steadily, with the balance sheet expanding by 5.9%. Facing ongoing uncertainties like trade conflicts and rate hikes among major economies, enterprises became more cautious in obtaining new loans. The total loan growth decelerated to 4.4% from 16.1% in 2017. This growth was mainly driven by loans used within Hong Kong (+6.5%) and offshore loans (+2%). Conversely, trade financing declined by 7.6%, reflecting global trade uncertainties. Growth in Mainland-related loans slowed from 17.5% in 2017 to 1.4% in 2018.

src_raw: 就負債方而言，存款總額在2018年增加5%，較2017年（+8.7%）的增幅小。由於預期美國持續加息，部分銀行上調定期存款利率，吸引存戶將往來及儲蓄存款轉為定期存款，從而鎖定資金。往來及儲蓄存款佔存款總額的比例由對上一年的57.4%，降至2018年底的51.4%，導致資金成本上升。由於存款總額的增長較貸款總額快，整體貸存比率由2017年底的73%稍降至2018年底的72.6%（圖5）。
mt_raw: On the liabilities side, total deposits increased by 5% in 2018, a smaller rise than 8.7% in 2017. Anticipating continued rate hikes in the US, some banks raised fixed deposit rates to encourage depositors to shift current and savings deposits into time deposits, thus locking in funds. The share of current and savings deposits in total deposits declined from 57.4% in the previous year to 51.4% at year-end 2018, resulting in higher funding costs. Since deposit growth outpaced loan growth, the overall loan-to-deposit ratio slightly decreased from 73% at the end of 2017 to 72.6% at the end of 2018 (Figure 5).

src_raw: 香港貨幣政策的主要目標是維持貨幣穩定，即確保港元匯價穩定，使港元在外匯市場兌美元的匯率保持在7.75至7.85港元兌1美元的區間內。該貨幣體制主要採用貨幣發行局制度，規定由外匯基金所持的美元儲備向貨幣基礎提供最少百分之百的支持；貨幣基礎若有變動，美元儲備亦必須作出相應增減，與貨幣基礎的變動百分之百配合。
mt_raw: Hong Kong’s monetary policy’s main objective is to maintain currency stability, which means ensuring the stability of the Hong Kong dollar’s exchange rate, keeping it within the range of 7.75 to 7.85 HKD per USD in the foreign exchange market. This monetary regime mainly adopts the Bank of England’s monetary issuance system, with the regulation that dollar reserves held by the Exchange Fund provide at least 100% support for monetary base; if the monetary base changes, USD reserves must also increase or decrease proportionally, maintaining a 100% match with the change in monetary base.

mt_raw:

- Certificates of Indebtedness (fully supporting banknotes issued by three note-issuing banks)
- Circulating banknotes and coins issued by the government
- Total balance in the settlement accounts held by banks at the HKMA (i.e., aggregate balance)
- USD bills and bonds issued by the HKMA on behalf of the government.

src_raw: 金管局透過自動利率調節機制及履行兌換保證的堅決承諾來維持港元匯率的穩定。若市場對港元的需求大過供應，令市場匯率轉強至7.75港元兌1美元的強方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行沽出港元、買入美元，使總結餘增加及港元利率下跌，從而令港元匯率從強方兌換保證匯率水平回復至7.75到7.85的兌換範圍內。相反，若港元供過於求，令市場匯率轉弱至7.85港元兌1美元的弱方兌換保證匯率，金管局會向銀行買入港元，使總結餘減少及推高港元利率，港元匯率隨之由弱方兌換保證匯率水平回復至兌換範圍內。
mt_raw: The HKMA maintains the stability of the HK dollar exchange rate through an automatic interest rate adjustment mechanism and a firm commitment to fulfill the exchange guarantee. If market demand for HK dollars exceeds supply, causing the exchange rate to appreciate to the strong-side guarantee level of 7.75 HKD per USD, the HKMA sells HK dollars to banks and buys USD, increasing the aggregate balance and lowering HK dollar interest rates. This process helps the exchange rate revert from the strong-side guarantee level back within the 7.75 to 7.85 HKD per USD trading range. Conversely, if HK dollar supply exceeds demand, causing the exchange rate to weaken to the weak-side guarantee of 7.85 HKD per USD, the HKMA buys HK dollars from banks, reducing the aggregate balance and pushing up HK dollar interest rates, helping the exchange rate to recover within the range.

src_raw: 在港元與美元負息差擴闊帶動套息活動的背景下，港元匯率自年初以來逐步轉弱。於4月12日，弱方兌換保證在2005年訂於7.85水平以來首度被觸發。全年計，弱方兌換保證在2018年合共被觸發27次，分別在4月被觸發13次，5月6次，以及8月8次。儘管如此，港元交易仍然暢順有序，港元匯率於4月中至9月中在弱方兌換保證匯率7.85附近徘徊（圖1）。其後港元匯率略為轉強，部分反映假期、季結及年結臨近，銀行同業流動性收緊，帶動部分套息交易平倉。同時，某程度上港元亦受到11月初股市氣氛好轉支持。整體而言，港元外匯市場在2018年全年正常運作。
mt_raw: Against the background of a widening negative interest differential between HKD and USD and the subsequent carry trade activities, the HK dollar exchange rate gradually weakened through 2018. On April 12, the weak-side guarantee was triggered for the first time since it was set at 7.85 in 2005. Throughout the year, the weak-side guarantee was triggered a total of 27 times: 13 times in April, 6 times in May, and 8 times in August. Nevertheless, HK dollar trading remained smooth and orderly, with the exchange rate hovering around the 7.85 level from mid-April to mid-September (see Figure 1). Subsequently, the HK dollar appreciated somewhat, partly reflecting holiday effects, seasonal and year-end liquidity tightening, and some position unwinding in carry trades. Meanwhile, market sentiment also supported a degree of recovery in November. Overall, the HK dollar foreign exchange market operated normally throughout 2018.

src_raw: 由於弱方兌換保證被觸發，總結餘與未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額由2017年底的12,268億港元，下降至2018年底的11,362億港元（圖2）。年內，金管局按照聯繫匯率制度（聯匯制度）的設計，應銀行要求於弱方兌換保證匯率7.85的水平，購入合共1,035億港元，總結餘因而由2017年底的1,798億港元下降至2018年底的764億港元。年內未償還外匯基金票據及債券總額沒有明顯變動。貨幣基礎仍然由外匯儲備提供十足支持。
mt_raw: Due to the triggering of the weak-side guarantee, the aggregate balance and the total of outstanding bills and bonds issued by the Exchange Fund decreased from HKD 1,226.8 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 1,136.2 billion at the end of 2018 (see Figure 2). During the year, the HKMA, following the design of the Linked Exchange Rate System (LERS), bought a total of HKD 103.5 billion from banks at the weak-side guarantee rate of 7.85, which caused the aggregate balance to decline from HKD 179.8 billion at the end of 2017 to HKD 76.4 billion at year-end. The total of outstanding bills and bonds issued by the Exchange Fund did not change significantly. The monetary base remains fully supported by USD reserves.

src_raw: 由於觸發弱方兌換保證後銀行同業流動性減少，以及市場預期美國加息，香港銀行同業拆息在2018年內普遍上升。受新股集資活動相關的資金需求增加及季節性流動資金需求帶動，短期銀行同業拆息更出現較大波幅（圖3）。整體而言，短期銀行同業拆息在2018年大致維持在低於基本利率的水平。鑑於銀行體系資金成本上升，在9月下旬美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍上調後，銀行調高最優惠貸款利率12.5至25基點。
mt_raw: Following the triggering of the weak-side guarantee and the reduction in interbank liquidity, and amid market expectations of US rate hikes, Hong Kong’s interbank rates generally rose in 2018. Driven by increased funding demands related to IPO activities and seasonal liquidity needs, short-term interbank rates experienced larger fluctuations (see Figure 3). Overall, short-term interbank rates stayed below the basic interest rate level for most of the year. As funding costs in the banking system rose, upon the US Federal Reserve’s target range increase in late September, banks raised their best lending rates by 12.5 to 25 basis points.

src_raw: 因應年內美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍4次合共上調100基點，由1.25至1.50厘上調至2.25至2.50厘，基本利率於3月22日、6月14日、9月27日及12月20日合共上調100基點，由1.75厘上調至2.75厘。基本利率的調整是按照2009年3月26日宣布的經修訂計算公式作出。按照該公式，基本利率定於美國聯邦基金利率目標範圍下限加50基點的水平，或隔夜與1個月香港銀行同業拆息的5天移動平均數的平均值水平，以兩者中較高者為準。
mt_raw: In response to the four US Federal Funds Rate increases totaling 100 basis points during the year (from 1.25-1.50% up to 2.25-2.50%), the basic interest rate was adjusted four times—on March 22, June 14, September 27, and December 20—by a total of 100 basis points, from 1.75% to 2.75%. These adjustments followed the revised formula announced on March 26, 2009, wherein the basic interest rate is set at the lower bound of the Federal Funds Rate target range plus 50 basis points, or the five-day moving average of overnight and 1-month HK interbank rates, whichever is higher.

mt_raw: The forward discount on the HK dollar expanded during the first four months, mainly following the movement of the HKD/USD interest differential, with the 12-month forward points reaching a negative 620 points in mid-April (see Figure 4). As the HKD/USD negative interest differential narrowed, the forward discount slightly decreased, then expanded again in the fourth quarter. Overall, the Hong Kong dollar money market continued to operate normally. Discount window borrowings increased from HKD 10.3 billion in 2017 to HKD 40.2 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 聯匯制度自1983年實施以來，直是維持香港貨幣及金融穩定的重要基石；並在多次區內以至全球金融危機考驗下，展現其承受強大衝擊的能力。由於港元轉弱，作為聯匯制度設計一部分的弱方兌換保證於4月、5月及8月被多次觸發。資金流出港元，是香港利率正常化的必經過程，亦是聯匯制度下的正常運作。為增進各界對有關操作及聯匯制度機制的了解，金管局致力向公眾闡釋聯匯制度的技術細節，並展示香港金融體系應對衝擊的能力。政府亦堅決維持聯匯制度。外匯及貨幣市場保持穩定，進一步鞏固公眾對政府的承擔，以及港元作為支付及保值貨幣的信心。國際貨幣基金組織在與香港進行2018年第四條磋商時，重申對聯匯制度的支持，並指出聯匯制度仍然是最適合香港的貨幣制度，是維持穩定的支柱，有助確保經濟持續增長、維持競爭力及促進龐大的金融服務業暢順運作。
mt_raw: Since its implementation in 1983, the Linked Exchange Rate System has been a fundamental pillar maintaining Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability; it has withstood multiple regional and global financial crises, demonstrating strong resilience. As the HK dollar weakened, the part of the system designed as the weak-side Convertibility Undertaking was triggered multiple times in April, May, and August. Capital outflows from HK dollars are a normal part of rate normalization and under the operation of the Linked Exchange Rate System.

src_raw: 鑑於穩健的銀行體系對聯匯制度的正常運作具關鍵作用，金管局繼續密切監察銀行的信用、流動性及利率風險管理，以及壓力測試結果，並維持對銀行的企業、物業相關及內地相關貸款的監管，以確保銀行體系具備承受衝擊的能力。銀行持有大量外匯基金票據及債券，可經貼現窗用作換取港元流動資金，為利率大幅波動的情況提供有效緩衝。金管局隨時準備透過調整外匯基金票據及債券的發行量以提供額外流動性，以應對資金可能急劇流出港元的情況。金管局亦提醒市民審慎管理市場及利率風險，並為可能出現的市場波動作好準備。
mt_raw: To enhance public understanding of the operational mechanics and the system’s framework, the HKMA actively explains the technical details of the system and showcases Hong Kong’s financial resilience. The government remains committed to maintaining the Linked Exchange Rate System. The foreign exchange and currency markets remained stable, further solidifying public confidence in the government’s ability to support the system and trust in the HK dollar as a medium of exchange and store of value. The IMF, during its 2018 Fourth Review with Hong Kong, reaffirmed support for the System, emphasizing that it remains the most suitable currency regime for Hong Kong, provides a stability anchor, and helps sustain economic growth, competitiveness, and the smooth operation of the vast financial services industry.

src_raw: 為提高貨幣發行局帳目的透明度，自1998年10月起，外匯基金已有部分資產被指定用作支持貨幣基礎。支持比率（即支持資產相對貨幣基礎的比率）於2018年在107.8至109.9%之間上落，並無觸及上限或下限。該比率於12月31日為109.9%（圖5）。在聯匯制度下，雖然已指定某些外匯基金資產作為支持組合，但外匯基金的全部資產均可用作支持港元匯率。外匯基金的龐大財政資源，能在面對突如其來的衝擊時為保障香港的貨幣及金融穩定提供強力後盾。
mt_raw: Given the critical role of a healthy banking system for the normal functioning of the Linked Exchange Rate System, the HKMA continues to closely monitor banks’ credit, liquidity, and interest rate risk management, as well as stress testing outcomes. The HKMA also maintains supervision of banks’ corporate, property-related, and Mainland-related lending to ensure the resilience of the banking system. Banks hold substantial amounts of USD bills and bonds, which can be converted into HK dollars through the discount window, providing effective buffers during significant interest rate fluctuations. The HKMA is prepared to adjust the issuance of USD bills and bonds to provide additional liquidity if needed, to cope with rapid capital outflows. It also advises the public to prudently manage market and interest rate risks and to prepare for possible market volatility.

src_raw: 外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的貨幣發行委員會（貨幣發行委員會）負責監察和探討與香港貨幣及金融穩定有關的課題。在2018年，貨幣發行委員會探討的課題包括多國央行聯合退出非常規貨幣政策對在香港的境外銀行美元貸款供應造成的潛在影響、港元貨幣需求的利率敏感度，以及聯匯制度自3項優化措施以來的運作機制及理論。貨幣發行委員會會議紀錄及金管局向其呈交的貨幣發行局制度運作報告，均載於金管局網站。
mt_raw: The Currency Issue Committee, under the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, is responsible for monitoring and discussing issues related to Hong Kong’s monetary and financial stability. In 2018, topics discussed included the potential impact of multilateral and multilateral exit strategies by multiple central banks on the offshore USD lending supply to Hong Kong banks, the interest rate sensitivity of HK dollar demand, and the operation mechanisms and theories of the system since its three enhancement measures. The committee’s meeting minutes and the Exchange Fund’s operation reports submitted to it are available on the HKMA’s website.

src_raw: 香港金融研究中心（研究中心）繼續支持貨幣政策、銀行業及金融範疇的研究工作。過去4年，研究中心更着重政策方面的研究，從所舉辦的研討會及訪問學者計劃尤其可見一斑。一方面，研究中心與主要中央銀行及政策研究機構合作，聯合舉辦更多政策相關的研討會。另一方面，在2016年推出專題研究學者計劃，支持更多與金管局政策制定相關的研究項目。
mt_raw: The Hong Kong Institute for Monetary Research (the Research Centre) continues to support research on monetary policy, banking, and finance. Over the past four years, the Centre has increasingly focused on policy-related research, especially evident in its seminars and visiting scholars programmes. The Centre cooperates with major central banks and policy research institutes to jointly host more policy-oriented seminars. Since launching the Special Research Scholars Programme in 2016, it has supported more research projects related to HKMA policymaking.

src_raw:
在2018年，研究中心合共邀請16位研究學者到訪，並發表了25份研究論文。年內研究中心亦舉辦了4場國際研討會：
- 於1月舉行的「第9屆中國經濟年度國際研討會」，主題為「中國房地產市場及其對經濟與金融穩定的影響」。研討會由研究中心、國務院發展研究中心市場經濟研究所及中國人民銀行金融研究所合辦，集中討論內地房地產市場相關的課題及風險。
- 於10月舉行由金管局及國際結算銀行合辦的「匯率與貨幣政策框架」研討會。研討會為國際結算銀行於香港的亞太區辦事處成立20周年的慶祝活動之一，旨在探討匯率在貨幣政策框架中的角色。
- 於11月舉行的「2018年中央銀行金融市場微結構的年度研討會」。研討會討論金融市場微結構理論研究、實證研究結果及近期發展相關的政策影響。
- 於11月舉行由金管局、歐洲中央銀行及美國聯邦儲備委員會合辦的「中國經濟的新時代」中國專家網絡研討會。研討會討論內地經濟正面對的迫切問題及其對全球經濟的影響，並特別着重與中央銀行決策者相關的政策議題。這是中國專家網絡研討會首次在歐洲以外地區舉行。
mt_raw:
In 2018, the Centre invited a total of 16 scholars for visits and published 25 research papers. During the year, it also organized four international conferences:
- The 9th Annual Conference on the Chinese Economy in January, themed “Real Estate Market and Its Impact on Economic and Financial Stability.” Co-hosted by the Research Centre, the Development Research Centre’s Institute of Market Economy, and the People’s Bank of China’s Financial Research Institute, focusing on issues and risks related to Mainland China’s real estate market.
- The Conference on “Exchange Rate and Monetary Policy Framework” in October, co-organized with the BIS, celebrating the 20th anniversary of the establishment of the BIS Asia-Pacific Office. The conference aimed to explore the role of exchange rates within monetary policy frameworks.
- The 2018 Annual Conference on Financial Market Microstructure of Central Banks in November, discussing theoretical and empirical research on microstructure and policy implications.
- The China Experts Network Seminar on “A New Era for China’s Economy” in November, jointly organized by HKMA, the BIS, and the US Federal Reserve, focusing on urgent domestic economic issues and their impacts on the global economy, with particular emphasis on policy issues relevant to central bank decision-makers. This seminar was held outside Europe for the first time.

src_raw: 儘管環球經濟及金融市場的不確定性增加，2018年香港銀行體系維持穩健。認可機構的流動性及信用風險管理制度的成效繼續是金管局年內的監管重點。鑑於網絡威脅持續增加，以及銀行業更廣泛使用金融科技，金管局加強對認可機構科技風險管理及業務操作恢復能力的監管。金管局亦於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本，並開始處理虛擬銀行認可申請。在操守監管方面，金管局採取進一步措施，加強監管認可機構銷售投資及保險產品的手法、促進為殘疾人士提供無障礙銀行服務，以及推動以客為本的企業文化。
mt_raw: Despite increasing uncertainties in the global economy and financial markets, the Hong Kong banking system remained sound in 2018. The effectiveness of the liquidity and credit risk management systems of authorized institutions continued to be a focus of the HKMA’s supervision during the year. Given the ongoing rise in cyber threats and the broader adoption of financial technology by banks, the HKMA enhanced its supervision of technological risks and operational resilience of authorized institutions. In May, the HKMA issued the revised “Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks” and commenced processing virtual banking license applications. Regarding conduct supervision, the HKMA took further measures to strengthen regulation of authorized institutions’ sales practices for investment and insurance products, promote barrier-free banking services for persons with disabilities, and foster a customer-centric corporate culture.

src_raw: 隨着金融罪行越趨複雜及全球化，金管局繼續借助新科技及風險為本方法，加強香港打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力。金管局在香港落實國際監管標準方面進展理想，其中包括資本充足標準、披露標準、流動性標準及大額風險承擔限額。此外，金管局亦加強與銀行業的溝通接觸，確保在監管成效與市場發展兩者間取得適當平衡。
mt_raw: As financial crimes become more complex and globalized, the HKMA continued leveraging new technologies and risk-based approaches to enhance Hong Kong’s capabilities to combat money laundering and terrorist financing. The HKMA has made good progress in implementing international supervisory standards, including standards for capital adequacy, disclosure, liquidity, and large exposures. Additionally, the HKMA strengthened communication with banks to ensure an appropriate balance between regulatory effectiveness and market development.

src_raw: 銀行可能因其營運方式，甚或在極端情況下因失序地倒閉而影響銀行體系的穩定。作為監管當局，金融管理專員在保障金融穩定方面擔當重要角色，確保銀行有能力抵禦衝擊、對危機作出應對，並自危機中恢復常態，以最終有助防止出現倒閉。金融管理專員負責對銀行進行審慎監管，以及認可香港的持牌銀行、有限制牌照銀行及接受存款公司（統稱「認可機構」）。金融管理專員亦負責某些金融市場基建的指定及監管。

src_raw: 然而，金融管理專員不能確保金融體系全無風險，香港的審慎監管制度亦非為了確保「零風險」而設。作為其中一個處置機制當局，金融管理專員力求確保一旦有認可機構不再可持續經營，即能有序地處理其倒閉。為此，香港已設立金融機構處置機制，金融管理專員於該機制之下作為包括認可機構在內的若干金融機構的處置機制當局。為建立運作暢順的香港處置機制，必須制定處置法例及政策標準、進行處置規劃以清除認可機構處置可行性的障礙，以及建立金管局處置無法經營的認可機構的運作能力。為有效執行上述工作，金管局需要採納與國際一致及協調的方法。

src_raw: 金管局在2018年共進行187次非現場審查，涵蓋範圍廣泛，包括認可機構的CAMEL評級、企業管治、業務操作及風險管理，以及認可機構應對金融科技發展的業務策略。為繼續加強認可機構的風險管治水平，金管局與認可機構董事局或董事局轄下委員會共舉行27次會議，並跟進認可機構實施企業管治指引的進度。此外，金管局與認可機構及其外聘核數師共舉行28次三方聯席會議。
mt_raw: In 2018, the HKMA conducted a total of 187 off-site reviews covering a broad range of areas, including CAMEL ratings, corporate governance, operational practices, and risk management of authorized institutions, along with their strategies in response to fintech developments. To further enhance risk governance, the HKMA held 27 meetings with the boards or board committees of authorized institutions and monitored the progress of the implementation of the corporate governance guidelines. Moreover, the HKMA held 28 tripartite joint meetings with authorized institutions and their external auditors.

src_raw: 除了非現場審查工作外，金管局繼續進行定期現場審查，並以專題評估作為配合，以審視被評估為較高風險的範疇。金管局於年內共進行392次現場審查及專題評估，並繼續以信用風險管理作為審查與評估的主要重點。其他重點為科技風險及業務操作風險管理，以及打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集管控措施。金管局亦增加針對流動性與市場風險管理，以及巴塞爾資本充足架構的實施情況的現場審查及專題評估次數。專項審查小組亦對認可機構的證券、投資產品、保險及強制性公積金（強積金）相關業務進行現場審查。
mt_raw: In addition to off-site reviews, the HKMA maintained regular on-site examinations and conducted focused assessments, particularly in areas identified as higher risk. Throughout the year, 392 on-site reviews and targeted evaluations were performed, with credit risk management remaining the core focus. Other key areas included technological risk, operational risk management, and measures against money laundering and terrorist financing. The HKMA also increased the number of on-site reviews and assessments related to liquidity, market risk management, and the implementation of Basel capital adequacy frameworks. Furthermore, dedicated review teams conducted on-site inspections of authorized institutions’ securities, investment products, insurance, and mandatory provident fund related businesses.

src_raw: 住宅物業價格在2018年7月到達歷史高位，但在下半年出現緩和跡象。金管局自2009年10月以來推出的8輪逆周期宏觀審慎監管措施，已增強香港銀行體系應對本港樓市可能逆轉的抵禦能力。新造住宅按揭貸款的平均按揭成數由2009年9月金管局推出首輪逆周期措施前的64%，降至2018年12月的46%。平均供款與入息比率亦由2010年8月首度推出有關比率上限時的41%，降至2018年12月的34%（圖1）。
mt_raw: Residential property prices peaked in July 2018 but showed signs of easing in the second half of the year. Since October 2009, the HKMA’s eight rounds of countercyclical macroprudential measures have strengthened the resilience of Hong Kong’s banking system against potential downturns in the local property market. The average loan-to-value (LTV) ratio for new residential mortgages decreased from 64% before the first round of measures in September 2009 to 46% in December 2018. The average debt service ratio (DSR) also declined from 41% when the cap was first introduced in August 2010 to 34% in December 2018 (Figure 1).

src_raw: 銀行業面對的科技風險仍然偏高。金管局於2016年推出「網絡防衛評估框架」。第一期實施安排涵蓋包括所有大型銀行在內的30間認可機構，該等認可機構已完成3個階段的評估，即自身風險程度評估、成熟程度評估及（如適用）風險資訊主導網絡攻防模擬測試。有關評估有助認可機構查找需要改進的運作範疇及採取補救措施，加強網絡防衛。與此同時，金管局已制定第二及第三期實施安排的時間表，這兩期實施安排將涵蓋其餘認可機構。年內金管局進行現場審查，集中檢視認可機構的網絡保安管控措施、外判安排及資訊科技管治。
mt_raw: Technological risks facing banks remain high. The HKMA launched the “Cyber Resilience Assessment Framework” in 2016. The first phase implementation covered all 30 authorized institutions, including all major banks, which completed three assessment stages: self-assessment of their risk levels, maturity assessment, and, where applicable, cyber attack simulation testing based on information technology risk management principles. These evaluations help authorized institutions identify operational gaps and remediate accordingly to enhance cyber defenses. Meanwhile, the HKMA outlined schedules for the second and third phases of adoption, which will involve the remaining authorized institutions. During the year, the HKMA conducted on-site inspections focusing on cybersecurity controls, outsourcing arrangements, and IT governance.

src_raw: 金管局繼續就2017年9月公布的7項推動智慧銀行的措施與銀行業合作，以促進金融科技在香港的發展。在監管層面，金管局於5月發出《虛擬銀行的認可》指引修訂本。此外，金管局在「銀行易」措施下，已經精簡有關遙距開戶、網上貸款及網上財富管理的監管要求。這些優化的監管要求有助銀行提供更佳的網上銀行用戶體驗。「銀行易」措施的工作範疇在9月擴大至促進銀行採用金融合規科技(Regtech)，而當中3個新的工作重點包括打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的監察科技、用於審慎風險管理和合規的金融合規科技，以及「機器可讀」的監管要求。
mt_raw: The HKMA continues collaborating with the banking industry on the seven measures introduced in September 2017 to promote smart banking and Fintech development in Hong Kong. In supervision, the HKMA revised the “Guideline on Authorization of Virtual Banks” in May. Additionally, under the “Banking Made Easy” initiative, the HKMA simplified regulatory requirements for remote onboarding, online lending, and online wealth management, facilitating improved online banking user experience. In September, the scope of “Banking Made Easy” expanded to include promoting the adoption of Regtech solutions. Three new focus areas include Regtech for anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing, Regtech for prudential risk management and compliance, and machine-readable regulatory requirements.

src_raw: 隨着美國貨幣政策持續正常化，金管局加強了流動性風險的監管，以確保認可機構審慎及有效地管理其流動性風險。年內金管局進行了一輪專題評估，以評估認可機構為美元流動性可能收緊所作的準備，以及其內部流動性壓力測試的能力。此外，金管局亦監察認可機構遵守於1月生效的「穩定資金淨額比率」要求的情況。
mt_raw: As US monetary policy continues normalization, the HKMA strengthened its oversight of liquidity risk to ensure authorized institutions prudently and effectively manage their liquidity. During the year, the HKMA conducted a focused assessment evaluating the preparedness of authorized institutions for potential tightening of US dollar liquidity and their internal stress-testing capabilities. The HKMA also monitored compliance with the new January 2018 “Net Stable Funding Ratio” requirement.

src_raw: 政府於4月發表的《香港洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集風險評估報告》指出，香港銀行體系面對高洗錢威脅，這與其他國際金融中心一樣，亦反映金融服務日趨全球化及複雜。香港面對的洗錢威脅除源自本地犯罪活動外，在更大程度上也來自境外活動。該等境外活動包括來自境外貪污活動的非法得益、跨國犯罪集團的詐騙活動、逃稅及基於香港作為支付及貿易樞紐的地位而引致與制裁相關的風險。在金管局協助下，政府制定打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集政策聲明，列載對該等威脅的回應，目標是在提高打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度的應對能力的同時，又能吸引及便利正當企業。
mt_raw: The government released the “Hong Kong Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Risk Assessment Report” in April, which highlighted high threats of money laundering facing Hong Kong’s banking system, reflecting the increasing globalization and complexity of financial services, similar to other international financial centers. The threats include local crimes and, to a greater extent, external activities such as illicit gains from overseas corruption, cross-border scams by transnational criminal groups, tax evasion, and sanctions-related risks stemming from Hong Kong’s role as a payment and trade hub. Supported by the HKMA, the government formulated policy statements on anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing, outlining responses to these threats. The aim is to enhance the resilience of the AML/CFT regime while maintaining a facilitating environment for legitimate businesses.

src_raw: 《2018年打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集（金融機構）（修訂）條例》於3月1日生效，引入的修訂包括在核實客戶身分方面賦予靈活性，以配合認可機構利用科技方便客戶開戶的發展。新法例亦擴大適用範圍，規定律師、會計師、地產代理及信託或公司服務提供者須負上打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的責任，從而全面強化打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度。該等修訂連同《公司條例》為提高企業實益擁有權透明度而作出的修訂，有助認可機構執行打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集方面的工作。
mt_raw: The amended “Anti-Money Laundering and Counter-Terrorist Financing (Financial Institutions) (Amendment) Ordinance” took effect on March 1. The revisions introduced greater flexibility in customer verification to accommodate the development of digital onboarding. The law also expanded scope to require lawyers, accountants, estate agents, and trust or corporate service providers to take responsibility for AML/CFT, thereby strengthening the overall regime. These amendments, together with the updated Companies (Amendment) Ordinance to enhance transparency of beneficial ownership, support authorized institutions in implementing AML/CFT measures.

src_raw: 為鞏固及進一步強化與認可機構就打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集政策與監管方法的溝通，金管局在10月發出《監管政策手冊》下的全新單元「打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集的監管方法」，及配合相關法例修訂的《打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集指引（認可機構適用）》，以能更有效實施風險為本的方法，並減少認可機構就打擊洗錢及恐怖分子資金籌集制度採用新科技的障礙。
mt_raw: To reinforce communication and coordination with authorized institutions on AML/CFT policies and supervisory approaches, the HKMA issued a new section titled “Supervision of AML and CFT” under the “Regulatory Policy Manual” in October. It also released the revised “Guideline on AML and CFT (Applicable to Authorized Institutions)” to implement a more effective risk-based approach and reduce obstacles in adopting new technologies for AML/CFT.

mt_raw:

- Release of the Open API framework for banks and promotion of industry adoption.
- Enhancement of fintech research and talent training.
- Strengthening cross-border fintech cooperation.
- Revision of the “Guidelines on Authorization of Virtual Banks” and processing of virtual bank license applications.
- Smooth operation of the upgraded “Fintech Supervisory Sandbox” (FSS 2.0).
- Expansion of “Banking Made Easy” to promote adoption of regtech by banks.

src_raw: 隨着中國內地與香港資本市場的互聯互通計劃優化措施的落實，香港作為進入中國內地主要門戶的獨特地位進一步加強。「債券通」全面實施即時貨銀兩訖(DvP)結算模式及國務院宣布境外投資者投資中國境內債券市場的稅務寛免安排，進一步提升計劃的效率及吸引力。金管局亦與內地當局緊密合作，探討及實施多項金融配套措施，便利在粵港澳大灣區（大灣區）生活、工作及營商的個人和企業。香港離岸人民幣業務繼續蓬勃發展，人民幣存款資金池全年上升6%至6,577億元人民幣；人民幣即時支付結算(RTGS)系統平均每日交易額達到10,101億元人民幣的高水平。
mt_raw: With the implementation of measures to optimize the Connect schemes for Mainland China and Hong Kong’s capital markets, Hong Kong’s unique role as the main gateway to Mainland China is further strengthened. The full deployment of the Bond Connect’s real-time DvP settlement mode, coupled with the State Council’s announcement of tax exemption arrangements for overseas investors in Mainland China’s bond market, enhances the scheme’s efficiency and attractiveness. The HKMA closely collaborates with Mainland authorities to explore and implement various financial supportive measures that facilitate the lives, work, and business activities of individuals and enterprises within the Guangdong-Hong Kong-Macao Greater Bay Area. The offshore renminbi business in Hong Kong continues to thrive, with the renminbi deposit pool rising by 6% annually to HKD 657.7 billion. The average daily transaction value of the Renminbi Real Time Gross Settlement (RTGS) system has reached a high level of RMB 1,010.1 billion.

src_raw: 金管局積極開拓進一步提升香港金融平台競爭力的新機會。為促進香港債券市場的發展，金管局落實《財政預算案》所提出的「債券資助先導計劃」，為首次在香港發行債券的機構提供資助，並與政府緊密合作修訂法例，擴大「合資格債務票據計劃」下可獲稅務豁免的債券投資收入範圍。金管局亦加強市場推廣活動，向海外及內地持份者宣傳香港的優勢，包括舉辦多項大型及專題外展活動推廣香港為綠色金融、基建融資及企業財資中心樞紐。
mt_raw: The HKMA actively seeks new opportunities to further enhance the competitiveness of Hong Kong’s financial platform. To support the development of Hong Kong’s bond market, the HKMA has implemented the “Bond Subsidy Pilot Scheme” announced in the Budget, providing funding to issuers for their inaugural bond issuance in Hong Kong, and closely collaborating with the government to amend laws to expand the scope of eligible bond investment income under the “Qualifying Debt Instrument” scheme for tax exemption. The HKMA also intensifies promotional activities, promoting Hong Kong’s advantages to overseas and Mainland stakeholders through various large-scale and thematic outreach events, focusing on district as a green finance, infrastructure financing, and corporate treasury hub.

src_raw: 香港金融基建的安全及有效運作，為香港作為國際金融中心的地位奠定穩固基礎。處理銀行同業交易的4個RTGS系統、債務工具中央結算系統（CMU系統）及香港交易資料儲存庫（香港儲存庫）在2018年達到100%的系統可供使用率，高於99.95%的目標水平。透過於內地兩個中央證券託管機構的帳戶，CMU系統繼續協助結算「債券通」北向通交易，以及替相關CMU系統成員持有內地債務證券。
mt_raw: The secure and efficient operation of Hong Kong’s financial infrastructure underpins its status as an international financial centre. In 2018, all four RTGS systems, the Central Moneymarkets Unit (CMU), and the Hong Kong Trade Repository achieved 100% system availability, exceeding the target of 99.95%. Through accounts in the two Mainland central securities depositories, the CMU continues to facilitate settlement of Bond Connect Northbound transactions and holds Mainland debt securities for relevant CMU members.

src_raw: 為促進零售支付業的整體安全及效率，金管局於8月根據《支付系統及儲值支付工具條例》（《支付條例》）指定多兩個零售支付系統，使其運作受到金管局監察。迄今受金管局監察的指定零售支付系統增至6個。金管局亦對16個儲值支付工具持牌人進行監管。有關持牌人積極推出新產品及服務，致力為客戶提供更多選擇及更佳的用戶體驗。與此同時，電子支票與電子帳單及繳費服務涵蓋範圍，進一步擴展至包括香港與整個廣東省的跨境支付交易。
mt_raw: To enhance overall security and efficiency in retail payments, the HKMA designated two additional retail payment systems under the Payment Systems and Stored Value Facilities Ordinance (“PSSVFO”) in August, bringing the total number of designated systems under HKMA supervision to six. It also regulates 16 stored value facility licensees. These licensees are actively launching new products and services to offer customers more choices and better user experiences. At the same time, electronic cheques, electronic bills, and payment services now extend further to include cross-border retail payment transactions within Hong Kong and across Guangdong Province.

src_raw: 開放API是指透過向第三方服務供應商開放銀行的相關數據，更好更方便地融合銀行與其他行業的服務。用家單用一個系統就能在安全環境下享受綜合服務。為促進銀行界研發及提供開放API，金管局於7月發布開放API框架。該框架採用風險為本原則，並分4個階段落實各項開放API功能。截至2019年1月底，20間銀行已開放第一階段約500個開放API接口，涵蓋逾1,000項產品及服務的資料。
mt_raw: Open API refers to banks sharing relevant data with third-party service providers, enabling better and more convenient integration of banking and other sector services. Customers can enjoy comprehensive services within a single, secure environment. To promote development and provision of open APIs within the banking sector, the HKMA released the Open API framework in July. Adopting a risk-based approach, the framework lays out four phases for implementing specific open API functionalities. By January 2019, 20 banks had opened around 500 APIs—covering data for more than 1,000 products and services.

src_raw: 建基於金管局主導的貿易融資概念驗證成果由香港多間銀行組成的聯盟於10月啟動以分布式分類帳技術(DLT)為基礎的貿易融資平台「貿易聯動」。該平台旨在透過數碼化貿易文件及自動化貿易融資流程，減低失誤及詐騙風險。截至2018年底，已有12間銀行加入成為該聯盟成員。「貿易聯動」與歐洲貿易融資平台「we.trade」於10月簽署《諒解備忘錄》，進行對接雙方平台的概念驗證。金管局亦同步探討「貿易聯動」與其他地區對接的機會，包括與新加坡金融管理局合作推出「全球貿易連接網絡」。
mt_raw: Based on successful proof-of-concept projects led by the HKMA in trade financing using distributed ledger technology (DLT), an alliance of Hong Kong banks launched the “Trade Connect” platform in October. This DLT-based platform aims to digitize trade documents and automate trade finance processes, reducing errors and fraud risks. By the end of 2018, 12 banks had joined the alliance. “Trade Connect” also signed an MoU with the European trade finance platform “we.trade” for interoperability verification. The HKMA is exploring further cross-regional collaborations, including with the Monetary Authority of Singapore to develop a “Global Trade Connectivity Network.”

src_raw: 2018年對投資者而言是困難的一年，投資環境備受多項風險因素困擾，包括美國利率持續正常化引發金融狀況收緊、主要經濟體之間的貿易摩擦升級，以及全球多處民粹主義抬頭及地緣政治風險加劇。環球股市普遍向下，美國國庫券收益率亦隨着美國聯邦儲備局4次加息而上升。在美息趨升下，美元轉強。部分新興市場面對國內嚴峻的政治及經濟壓力，其貨幣顯著下挫。儘管投資環境充滿挑戰，外匯基金在2018年仍錄得109億港元投資收入。
mt_raw: 2018 was a challenging year for investors, as the investment environment was troubled by multiple risk factors, including the continued normalization of US interest rates leading to tighter financial conditions, escalating trade tensions among major economies, and widespread populism and increased geopolitical risks worldwide. Global stock markets generally declined, while US Treasury yields rose following four rate hikes by the Federal Reserve. The US dollar strengthened amid rising US interest rates. Some emerging markets faced severe domestic political and economic pressures, leading to significant currency depreciation. Despite the challenging environment, the Exchange Fund recorded an investment income of HKD 10.9 billion in 2018.

src_raw: 外匯基金大致上分成兩個主要組合：支持組合及投資組合。支持組合持有流通性極高的美元資產，按照貨幣發行局制度的規定為貨幣基礎提供十足支持。投資組合主要投資於經濟合作與發展組織成員國的債市及股市，以保障資產的價值及長期購買力。
mt_raw: Generally, the Exchange Fund’s assets are divided into two main portfolios: the Support Portfolio and the Investment Portfolio. The Support Portfolio holds highly liquid US dollar assets, providing full backing for the monetary base in accordance with the Hong Kong dollar Linked Exchange Rate System. The Investment Portfolio primarily invests in debt and equity markets of member countries of the Organisation for Economic Co-operation and Development (OECD) to preserve asset value and long-term purchasing power.

src_raw: 為能更妥善管理風險及提高中長期回報，金管局以審慎及循序漸進方式將外匯基金的部分資產分散投資至較多元化的資產類別，包括新興巿場及內地債券與股票、私募股權（包括基建）及房地產。新興巿場及內地債券與股票由投資組合持有，私募股權及房地產投資則由長期增長組合持有。長期增長組合的市值上限為外匯基金累計盈餘的三分之一及未來基金與外匯基金附屬公司存款中與長期增長組合掛鈎部分的總和。
mt_raw: To better manage risk and enhance medium- to long-term returns, the HKMA prudently and gradually diversifies the Fund’s assets into more diverse asset classes, including emerging markets and Mainland China bonds and equities, as well as private equity (including infrastructure) and real estate. Emerging markets and Mainland bonds and equities are held within the Investment Portfolio, while private equity and real estate investments are part of the Long-Term Growth Portfolio. The total market value of the Long-Term Growth Portfolio is capped at one-third of the total accumulated surplus of the Exchange Fund and the combined amount of future funds and deposits of subsidiaries linked to the Exchange Fund that are attributable to the Long-Term Growth Portfolio.

src_raw: 外匯基金的投資程序分別以策略性資產配置及戰略性資產配置作基礎。策略性資產配置，即投資基準反映的配置情況，顯示外匯基金為達到投資目標而可作出的長線資產配置。外匯基金以策略性配置作為指引，對資產進行戰略性配置，以爭取超越基準的回報。因此，實際配置往往會與基準配置（亦即策略性配置）有所偏離，而實際與基準配置之間的差距稱為「戰略性偏離」。財政司司長經諮詢外匯基金諮詢委員會後制定投資基準及循跡誤差限額，金管局獲授權決定戰略性資產配置及定出戰略性偏離的容許範圍。投資組合經理可在戰略性偏離的容許範圍內選持倉盤，從短期市場變化中獲利。
mt_raw: The investment procedures of the Exchange Fund are based on both Strategic Asset Allocation and Tactical Asset Allocation. Strategic Asset Allocation, reflecting the benchmark investment configuration, indicates the long-term asset allocation intended to meet investment objectives. Guided by the strategic asset allocation, the Fund undertakes Tactical Asset Allocation to pursue returns exceeding the benchmark. Therefore, actual asset allocations often deviate from the benchmark configuration, with the differences called “strategic deviations.” The Financial Secretary, after consulting the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, sets the investment benchmark and the tolerances for tracking error. The HKMA is authorized to determine the strategic asset allocation and to establish allowable ranges for deviations. Portfolio managers can hold positions within these allowed deviations to profit from short-term market movements.

The assets in this portion primarily invest in global fixed income markets and implement macro risk management strategies through derivatives.

src_raw: 投資環境越趨複雜，突顯風險管理的重要。金管局為內部及外聘投資經理所管理的投資組合均訂立嚴格管控措施及投資指引，並密切監察對指引及法規的遵守情況。金管局已加強風險評估，以配合外匯基金越趨多元化的投資；另採用風險管控工具來評估在正常及極度不利市況下的市場風險。金管局亦進行詳細的投資表現因素分析，以識別促成不同表現的成因，藉此評估如何充分利用內部及外聘投資經理的投資管理技術。
mt_raw: As the investment environment becomes increasingly complex, risk management becomes more critical. The HKMA has implemented stringent controls and investment guidelines for both internal and external managers, and closely monitors compliance. The HKMA has enhanced risk assessment to match the Fund’s diversification, employing risk control tools to evaluate market risks under normal and adverse conditions. Detailed performance factor analyses are conducted to identify the factors driving performance variations, thereby assessing how to fully utilize internal and external managers’ investment expertise.

src_raw: 金管局支持負責任投資。例如，金管局已採納證券及期貨事務監察委員會公布的《負責任的擁有權原則》。該套原則旨在協助投資者釐定如何以最佳方法履行其於香港上市公司投資的擁有權責任。就外匯基金的管理而言，金管局已就環境、社會及管治因素制定內部指引，適用於外聘基金經理的甄選、委任及監察程序。獲委任負責主動式管理香港股票組合的外聘基金經理，須在管理有關投資時遵守《負責任的擁有權原則》。整體而言，金管局已將環境、社會及管治因素納入投資及相關監察活動的內部程序。金管局會密切注視環境、社會及管治因素的相關標準的發展，並評估如何能夠將這些標準進一步融入投資程序。此外，為促進負責任投資的國際合作，金管局已成為非牟利組織FCLTGlobal的成員，該組織旨在推動長遠目標為本的業務及投資決定。
mt_raw: The HKMA supports responsible investment practices. For example, it has adopted the Principles of Responsible Ownership issued by the Securities and Futures Commission (SFC). These principles help investors determine how to best fulfill their ownership responsibilities in Hong Kong-listed companies. Regarding the management of the Exchange Fund, the HKMA has established internal guidelines on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors, which apply to the selection, appointment, and monitoring of external fund managers. External managers responsible for actively managing Hong Kong equity portfolios are required to comply with the Principles of Responsible Ownership when managing relevant investments. Overall, the HKMA has incorporated ESG factors into its internal procedures for investment and monitoring activities. It closely monitors developments in ESG standards and considers further integrating these standards into its investment processes. Additionally, to promote international cooperation on responsible investment, the HKMA is a member of the non-profit organization FCLTGlobal, which advocates long-term, value-oriented business and investment decisions.

src_raw: 中美貿易爭議升級，令投資者非常憂慮，新興市場及香港股市自1月底開始反覆下跌，恒生指數自該月份的高位最多下跌27%。自第4季起，主要歐美股市亦大幅下滑，錄得雙位數字跌幅。就2018年整體而言，全球股市普遍下跌，涵蓋已發展國家股市的MSCI全球指數下跌10.4%，MSCI新興市場指數亦下跌16.6%。
mt_raw: As US-China trade tensions escalated, investors became highly concerned. Equities in emerging markets and Hong Kong's stock market declined repeatedly from the end of January, with the Hang Seng Index dropping up to 27% from its high in that month. Since the fourth quarter, major European and American stock indices also fell sharply, recording double-digit declines. Overall in 2018, global stock markets experienced widespread declines, with the MSCI World Index falling 10.4%, and the MSCI Emerging Markets Index down 16.6%.

src_raw: 債市方面，由於美國貨幣政策正常化，美國國庫券收益率於2018年大致向上。然而，年內債市仍有波動。例如10年期美國國庫券收益率由年初約2.5%上升至11月3.2%的7年新高，但至年底時受投資者憂慮中美貿易爭議及趨向避險投資所影響而回軟至2.7%。
mt_raw: In the bond markets, US Treasury yields generally rose in line with interest rate normalization. Despite fluctuations throughout the year, the 10-year US Treasury yield rose from about 2.5% at the start of the year to a new 7-year high of 3.2% in November, before retreating to 2.7% at year-end amid concerns over US-China trade disputes and a flight to safety.

src_raw: 貨幣市場方面，年內美元跟隨美國加息轉強。美匯指數上升4.4%，歐元及人民幣等主要貨幣兌美元下跌約5%。此外，部分新興市場受到國內政局及經濟不穩影響，其貨幣進一步受挫。例如，阿根廷披索及土耳其里拉兌美元分別下跌約五成及三成。相比之下，避險投資需求帶動日圓兌美元上升2.7%。
mt_raw: In the currency markets, the US dollar appreciated following US rate hikes, with the US Dollar Index increasing by 4.4%. Major currencies such as the euro and renminbi depreciated by about 5% against the USD. Some emerging market currencies were further pressured by domestic political and economic instability, with the Argentine peso and Turkish lira falling approximately 50% and 30%, respectively. By contrast, demand for safe-haven assets pushed the Japanese yen up by 2.7% against the dollar.

mt_raw: The HKMA’s official website (www.hkma.gov.hk) provides over 60,000 pages of information in English, Traditional Chinese, and Simplified Chinese, making it easy for the public to access the latest news about the HKMA. src_raw: 為推動銀行業落實開放應用程式介面(API)，金管局身體力行，7月開始在其網站提供開放API，方便公眾取用金管局的重要資訊。首批50組開放API形式資料在7月順利推出，涵蓋市民最常查閱的範疇，例如銀行體系及外匯基金的統計數據，以及新聞稿與收銀車日程表等。餘下的80組資料將於2019年中前分階段推出。為進一步方便公眾在網站查閱有關金管局的最新消息及資訊，金管局正全面修訂網站的設計及內容，使其更方便易用。全新設計的網站預期將於2019年內推出。
mt_raw: To promote the implementation of open Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) in banking, the HKMA has actively developed and applied open APIs. Starting in July, it has provided APIs on its website to facilitate public access to key information. The initial batch of 50 APIs was launched smoothly in July, covering popular categories such as banking system statistics, the Exchange Fund, press releases, and schedules for cash deposit vehicles. An additional 80 sets of data are planned to be released gradually before mid-2019. To further enhance access to HKMA’s latest news and information, a comprehensive revision of the website’s design and content is underway, with a new version expected to be launched in 2019.

src_raw: 金管局資訊中心設於國際金融中心2期55樓，向公眾介紹金管局工作及提高公眾對貨幣與銀行業事宜的了解。資訊中心分為展覽館及圖書館兩部分，每星期6天開放予公眾參觀使用。展覽館介紹金管局的工作，以及香港貨幣與銀行業的發展；另備閱讀資料與展品，供研究香港貨幣、銀行業與金融事務。
mt_raw: The HKMA’s Information Centre, located on the 55th floor of the International Finance Centre Phase 2, introduces the HKMA’s work and enhances public understanding of monetary and banking affairs. mt_raw: The currency area of the Centre displays the design, anti-counterfeit features, production process, and interesting facts about Hong Kong banknotes and coins. Additionally, a new art Bauhinia tree has been added, composed of 2,018 transparent cubes made from banknotes that are no longer suitable for circulation and have been shredded, complemented by a mosaic artwork of Hong Kong coins. The revamped currency exhibition reopened on August 16.

mt_raw: The Centre offers guided tours to visitors. Over 59,000 visitors were received during the year, with more than 580 guided tours provided to schools and groups (see Figure 3). mt_raw: In 2018, to maintain communication with the community and raise awareness of the HKMA’s work, the HKMA held three public education talks, attracting about 1,500 students and teachers. src_raw: 財政司司長透過外匯基金諮詢委員會聽取其轄下管治委員會的意見，並參考市場薪酬水平及做法，決定金管局員工的薪酬及服務條件。薪酬組合包括現金薪酬及公積金，另設一些基本福利。現金薪酬包括每月固定薪酬（即基本薪酬）及根據員工工作表現每年一次過發放的浮動薪酬。

Cash pay comprises a fixed monthly salary (basic salary) and, annually, a performance-based variable component.

src_raw: 金管局按個別員工的工作表現，分配獲批准用作調整年度固定薪酬及浮動薪酬的款項；而適用於負責投資的員工的浮動薪酬制度，則旨在加強其投資表現與薪酬的連繫。助理總裁及以上職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，是由財政司司長經參考管治委員會的意見後批准，有關員工在會議討論到其薪酬的議案時會避席。主管及以下職級員工的固定薪酬調整及浮動薪酬的發放，則由金管局總裁根據財政司司長授權，並按照獲批准用作支付薪酬的整筆款項來決定。
mt_raw: Based on individual performance, the HKMA allocates funds approved for annual fixed and — for investment staff — variable pay adjustments. The variable pay system aims to link investment performance with remuneration. Salary adjustments for staff at assistant director level and above are approved by the Financial Secretary, upon recommendation from the governance committee, with those staff recusing themselves from relevant discussions. Adjustments for managers and below are determined by the Chief Executive, based on the total approved remuneration package, under delegation from the Financial Secretary.

src_raw: 金融管理專員須負責按照香港會計師公會頒布的《香港財務報告準則》及行政長官在《外匯基金條例》第7條下所發出的指示擬備真實而中肯的財務報表，及落實其認為必要的內部控制， 使財務報表不存有因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: The Financial Management Officer is responsible for preparing true and fair financial statements in accordance with Hong Kong Financial Reporting Standards issued by the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants and the instructions issued by the Chief Executive under section 7 of the Exchange Fund Ordinance, and for implementing internal controls deemed necessary to ensure that the financial statements do not contain material misstatements due to fraud or error.

src_raw: 在擬備財務報表時，金融管理專員須負責評估集團持續經營的能力，以及在適用情況下披露與持續經營有關的事項，並以持續經營作為會計基礎。
mt_raw: When preparing the financial statements, the Financial Management Officer must evaluate the Group’s ability to continue as a going concern, disclose relevant matters related to ongoing concern where applicable, and use going concern as the basis for accounting.

terms: {'審計署': 'Audit Commission', '財務報表': 'financial statements'}
src_raw: 我的目標是就整體財務報表是否不存有任何因欺詐或錯誤而導致的重大錯誤陳述取得合理保證，並發出包括我意見的審計師報告。合理保證是高水平的保證，但不能確保按審計署審計準則進行的審計定能發現所存有的任何重大錯誤陳述。錯誤陳述可以由欺詐或錯誤引起，如果合理預期它們個別或滙總起來可能影響財務報表使用者所作出的經濟決定，則會被視作重大錯誤陳述。
mt_raw: My objective is to obtain reasonable assurance as to whether the overall financial statements are free from material misstatement caused by fraud or error, and to issue an auditor’s report including my opinion. Reasonable assurance is high but not absolute, and therefore the audit conducted in accordance with Hong Kong Standards on Auditing may not always detect material misstatements if they exist.

mt_raw: In conducting my audit in accordance with Hong Kong Standards on Auditing, I will use professional judgment and maintain professional skepticism. I will also:

terms: {'審計憑證': 'audit evidence', '財務報表': 'financial statements'}
src_raw:
- 識別和評估因欺詐或錯誤而導致財務報表存有重大錯誤陳述的風險；設計及執行審計程序以應對這些風險；以及取得充足和適當的審計憑證，作為我意見的基礎。由於欺詐可能涉及串謀、偽造、蓄意遺漏、虛假陳述，或凌駕內部控制的情況，因此未能發現因欺詐而導致重大錯誤陳述的風險，較未能發現因錯誤而導致者為高；
- 了解與審計相關的內部控制，以設計適當的審計程序。然而，此舉並非旨在對集團內部控制的有效性發表意見；
- 評價金融管理專員所採用的會計政策是否恰當，以及其作出的會計估計和相關資料披露是否合理；
- 判定金融管理專員以持續經營作為會計基礎的做法是否恰當，並根據所得的審計憑證，判定是否存在與事件或情況有關，而且可能對集團持續經營的能力構成重大疑慮的重大不確定性。如果我認為存在重大不確定性，則有必要在審計師報告中請使用者留意財務報表中的相關資料披露。假若所披露的相關資料不足，我便須發出非無保留意見的審計師報告。我的結論是基於截至審計師報告日止所取得的審計憑證。然而，未來事件或情況可能導致集團不能繼續持續經營；
- 評價財務報表的整體列報方式、結構和內容，包括披露資料，以及財務報表是否中肯反映交易和事項；及
- 就集團中實體或業務活動的財務資料獲取充足和適當的審計憑證，以對財務報表發表意見。我負責指導、監督和執行集團審計。我對我的審計意見承擔全部責任。

src_raw: 我亦會向外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的審核委員會提交聲明，說明我已符合有關獨立性的相關道德要求，並與他們溝通所有被合理認為可能會影響我獨立性的關係和其他事項，以及在適用的情況下，相關的防範措施。
mt_raw: I will also communicate to the Audit Committee of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee a statement that I have fulfilled the relevant ethical requirements to maintain independence, and will discuss all relationships and other matters that may reasonably be thought to bear on my independence and, where applicable, the related safeguards.

src_raw: 從與外匯基金諮詢委員會轄下的審核委員會溝通的事項中，我會決定哪些事項對本期財務報表的審計最為重要，因而構成關鍵審計事項。我會在審計師報告中描述這些事項，除非法律法規不允許對某件事項作出公開披露，或在極端罕見的情況下，因為有合理預期在我報告中溝通某事項而造成的負面後果將會超過其產生的公眾利益而我決定不應在報告中溝通該事項。
mt_raw: From my communications with the Audit Committee of the Exchange Fund Advisory Committee, I will determine which matters were of most significance in the audit of the current period’s financial statements and will describe these in my auditor’s report, unless the law or regulations prohibit public disclosure of particular matters or, in extremely rare circumstances, the adverse consequences of communication outweigh the public interest in disclosure.
